invariants.INV_CAN_DETERMINISTIC: Same logical value produces identical bytes on every serialization call
invariants.INV_CAN_NO_FLOAT: No IEEE 754 floating-point values in serialized trust artifacts
invariants.INV_CAN_DOMAIN_TAG: Every signature preimage includes two-byte domain-separation tag
invariants.INV_CAN_NO_BYPASS: All signing routes pass through CanonicalSerializer

test_requirements.BD_JJM_SCHEMA_001: 6 trust object types registered with correct schemas
test_requirements.BD_JJM_ROUND_TRIP_001: Round-trip canonical passes for all types
test_requirements.BD_JJM_DETERMINISM_001: Identical inputs produce identical serialized outputs
test_requirements.BD_JJM_DOMAIN_TAG_001: Domain tags are non-zero and unique per type
test_requirements.BD_JJM_PREIMAGE_001: Signature preimage construction includes domain separation
